services.name: Memorial Health University Medical Center
services.notes: Level 1 trauma center, 612 beds, comprehensive emergency services

services.name: CVS Pharmacy - Savannah Historic District
services.notes: Walk-in clinic inside, vaccinations, open extended hours

services.name: Kroger - Savannah Midtown
services.notes: Full supermarket, pharmacy, deli, closest large grocery to historic district

services.name: Wells Fargo - Savannah Bull Street
services.notes: Full-service branch in historic district, ATM, financial advisors

services.name: SouthCoast Health Primary Care
services.notes: Multi-physician primary care, accepting new patients, online portal

services.name: Savannah Dental Solutions
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, same-day emergency appointments

services.name: Savannah Veterinary Medical Center
services.notes: Full-service vet hospital, emergency and specialty care, boarding

services.name: Forsyth Park Dog-Friendly Areas
services.notes: 30-acre park with designated dog walking areas, iconic fountain, shaded paths

services.name: Old Town Athletic Club
services.notes: Historic district gym, modern equipment, group fitness, personal training

services.name: Christ Church Episcopal Savannah
services.notes: Historic church founded 1733, active parish, beautiful colonial architecture

services.name: Savannah/Hilton Head International Airport (SAV)
services.notes: Direct flights to major US cities, growing international connections

services.name: Savannah DOT Free Shuttle
services.notes: Free downtown shuttle (DOT), connects major historic district points

services.name: The Creative Coast - Bull Street Labs
services.notes: Coworking and innovation hub, day passes, community events, fast WiFi

services.name: Kroger family of stores
services.notes: Largest US supermarket operator; regional banners (Ralphs, Fred Meyer, King Soopers, Smith's, Fry's, etc.).

attractions.name: Forsyth Park
attractions.description: Iconic 30-acre park with famous fountain, Spanish moss-draped oaks, weekend farmers market

attractions.name: River Street
attractions.description: Cobblestone waterfront promenade with shops, restaurants, galleries along the Savannah River

attractions.name: SCAD Museum of Art
attractions.description: Contemporary art museum by Savannah College of Art and Design, rotating exhibitions

attractions.name: Wormsloe Historic Site
attractions.description: Stunning 1.5-mile oak avenue leading to colonial estate ruins, living history demonstrations
attractions.frequency: Daily 9:00-17:00, colonial life demos on weekends

attractions.name: Bonaventure Cemetery
attractions.description: Hauntingly beautiful Victorian cemetery on bluffs above the Wilmington River, Spanish moss canopy

attractions.name: City Market Savannah
attractions.description: Open-air market district with restaurants, galleries, and live music, Savannah's social hub
attractions.frequency: Daily, restaurants and bars open late

attractions.name: Savannah Theatre
attractions.description: One of America's oldest continuously operating theaters (est. 1818), live shows and musicals

attractions.name: Tybee Island
attractions.description: Barrier island beach community with lighthouse, pier, marine science center, 20 min from downtown
attractions.frequency: Day trip, beach open year-round, lighthouse daily

attractions.name: Savannah Squares Walking Tour
attractions.description: Self-guided walk through 22 iconic squares, each with unique character, monuments, and live oaks
attractions.frequency: Anytime, best morning or late afternoon
